hero.subtitle: In the Amazon and in France, AKUU connects volunteers and local communities around concrete solidarity projects.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: AKUU works for sustainable, solidarity-based development that respects Amazonian populations, placing local cooperation, knowledge sharing and environmental protection at the heart of its actions.

featured_project.title: Featured project
featured_project.subtitle: Shapishiko Museum
featured_project.description: A cultural space in the heart of the Amazon to preserve and promote Kukama culture.

donation.title: Support our actions
donation.text: Every donation directly contributes to the sustainable development of Puerto Miguel village and the preservation of Kukama culture.

social.title: Follow us
social.subtitle: Follow our adventures and projects in real time on social media

partners.title: Our partners
partners.subtitle: They trust us and support our projects

association.who_text: AKUU is a French non-profit (loi 1901), founded on November 23, 2016. It carries out field missions in the Peruvian Amazon — mainly in Puerto Miguel — and conducts awareness campaigns in the home countries of its volunteers.
association.quote: AKUU is a project I believe in with all my strength. AKUU reminds me of my connection with nature, with traditions. This word means the sharing of energies, the respect for the forest, its fauna, its flora...

durable.title: Sustainable development
durable.text: Promoting solutions that respect the environment and local resources.

solidarite.title: International solidarity
solidarite.text: Building bridges between cultures and fostering mutual aid between peoples.

culture.title: Respect for local cultures
culture.text: Valuing and preserving the ancestral knowledge of Kukama communities.

savoirs.title: Knowledge sharing
savoirs.text: Sharing knowledge to strengthen community autonomy.

environnement.title: Environmental protection
environnement.text: Taking concrete action to preserve the Amazon rainforest.

echanges.title: Intercultural exchanges
echanges.text: Fostering mutual understanding through sharing and meeting.

association.odd_subtitle: AKUU's actions are directly aligned with the United Nations 2030 Agenda. Each of our projects contributes to at least one SDG.

legal.siege: Headquarters: 889 Chemin de Jylloue, 06 250 Mougins, France

projets.hero_subtitle: Concrete actions for a sustainable future in the Amazon

musee.hero_subtitle: A cultural space to preserve and promote Kukama culture
musee.description_text: The Shapishiko Museum is AKUU's flagship project: building a cultural space in the heart of Puerto Miguel village, in the Peruvian Amazon. This museum will be dedicated to preserving and promoting Kukama culture, the indigenous people of the region. It will host exhibitions of local art, workshops for sharing ancestral knowledge, and serve as a meeting place between local communities and visitors.
musee.support_text: Contribute to the construction of the Shapishiko Museum and help us preserve Kukama culture for future generations.

volontaires.hero_subtitle: Live a unique experience in the heart of the Peruvian Amazon

immersion.title: Real responsibilities
immersion.text: AKUU is a human-scale association. You're not a number — you respond to a need expressed directly by the community and own your mission from start to finish.

impact.title: Act for the Amazon
impact.text: The people who live in the Amazon forest are its greatest protectors. Working with them is the most concrete and honest way to contribute to its preservation.

skills.title: Learn, don't teach
skills.text: Kukama communities hold knowledge found nowhere else. Every former volunteer comes back with a different understanding of time, life and community.

community.title: A mission that matters
community.text: No boxes to tick, no photo opportunities. A useful presence, within a lasting project, alongside people who have chosen to welcome you.

step1.title: Application
step1.text: Send your application via our contact form.

step2.title: Interview
step2.text: Discussion with the team to validate your motivation and skills.

step4.title: Mission
step4.text: Departure for Puerto Miguel and immersion in projects.

civique.title: Civic service
civique.text: Via AIME ONG / France Volontaires. 6 to 12 months.

volontaires.cta_text: Contact us to learn more about available missions.

soutien.label: Take action
soutien.hero_text1: All of AKUU's running costs — banking, logistics, website — are covered by our volunteers and close supporters.
soutien.simulator_note: 66% tax deduction for French residents (art. 200 CGI)
soutien.widget_badge: Monthly donation recommended · Cancel anytime · Automatic tax receipt
soutien.widget_secure: Secure payment by HelloAsso · Zero fees on your donation
soutien.other_subtitle: Beyond donating, join the AKUU adventure
soutien.adherer_text: From €10/year, become a member, attend general assemblies and receive our activity reports.
soutien.benevole_text: 3 to 6 months in Puerto Miguel or in France for AKUUVision. Construction, education, culture — a unique human experience.
soutien.partenaire_text: Company, institution, university — join us for a lasting and visible impact.
